Professional Basketball

Professional Basketball Court Flooring Solutions

High-performance basketball flooring engineered for superior ball rebound, shock absorption, and player protection. Perfect for competitive tournaments and recreational facilities.

01615550098

Basketball Flooring

Unlike racquet sports, ball games usually require the sports flooring with high ball rebound coefficient and good shock absorption to protect athletes effectively while they playing on it. JOYFULL gives the right solution with Basketball flooring collections. Basketball floor is mainly assessed in two aspects: first, the ball rebound rate is good enough; Then, the floor should have a good shock absorption, can well protect the athletes.

Ball rebound rate > 90%
Good shock absorption
Protects athletes effectively
Helps retain physical strength
Reduces player fatigue
Professional-grade quality

Product Range

Choose from our professional basketball flooring options, each engineered for optimal performance and durability.

Advanced Technology

Our basketball flooring features cutting-edge technology for professional performance.

Glaze+ Surface Treatment

Advanced surface treatment for superior performance and durability.

DW Tech Fibreglass Grid

Reinforced fibreglass grid for enhanced stability and longevity.

Double Density Foam Backing

HD tech closed-cell foam provides excellent shock absorption and comfort.

Professional Grade

Meets all standards for professional basketball competition.
